service.description: Generates MT700 (Issue of a Documentary Credit). Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle rules.

log.message: No ImportLetterOfCredit found for instrumentId ${instrumentId}. Skipping SWIFT generation.

return.message: Active MT700 already exists for this instrument. Regeneration blocked for dispatched messages.
SWIFT Validation failed for ACTIVE message (instrument ${instrumentId}): ${valResult.errors.collect{it.message}.join(', ')}

log.message: SWIFT DRAFT Validation warnings for instrument ${instrumentId}: ${valResult.errors.collect{it.message}.join(', ')}
In generate#Mt700 for ${instrumentId}, found transaction: ${transaction?.transactionId}, status: ${transaction?.transactionStatusId}, type: ${transaction?.transactionTypeEnumId}

service.description: Generates MT701 (Issue of a Documentary Credit Continuation). Used for large fields (45B, 46B, 47B).

log.message: No ImportLcAmendment found for amendmentId ${amendmentId}. Skipping SWIFT generation.

return.message: Active MT707 already exists. Regeneration blocked for dispatched messages.

log.message: SWIFT DRAFT Validation warnings for amendment ${amendmentId}: ${valResult.errors.collect{it.message}.join(', ')}

service.description: Advice of Discrepancy. Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Advice of Refusal. Implements FR-SWG-09 disposal mapping and FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Authorisation to Pay, Accept or Negotiate. Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Advice of Discharge. Implements FR-SWG-11 Maturity Date and FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Free Format Message. Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Single Customer Credit Transfer (Settlement). Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.
Financial Institution Transfer. Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle.

actions.script:
def fields = [:] fields["21"] = inst.transactionRef fields["32A"] = ec.user.nowTimestamp.format("yyMMdd") + (settle.remittanceCurrency ?: "USD") + String.format("%.2f", settle.principalAmount).replace(".", ",") fields["58A"] = "BENEBANK"
def renderRes = ec.service.sync().name("trade.SwiftUtilsServices.render#SwiftMessage") .parameters([messageType:"202", senderBic:issuerBic, receiverBic:"CORRESPBANK", senderRef:inst.transactionRef, fields:fields]).call() messageContent = renderRes.messageContent
